scripts.pretest: node -e "var major=parseInt(process.versions.node.split('.')[0],10); if(major<20){console.error('Node.js 20+ is required for this project. Current: '+process.versions.node); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.lint:webext: npx web-ext lint --source-dir . --ignore-files scripts/** --ignore-files experiments/** || true
